nodes.label: REVIEW — Adaptive Multi-Axis Review
nodes.rationale: 1 P0, 40 P1, 56 P2, 35 P3. Architecture intent is real and algorithms right, but one licensing P0 on a served path and two hard rules the code contradicts.

nodes.label: P0: AGPL Quarantine Breach on Served Path
nodes.rationale: mcp_server/server.py:153 — served MCP tool inspect_pdf imported AGPL PyMuPdfInspector, violating N2. Fix: license-clean inspector (pikepdf/pypdfium2), PyMuPDF stays CLI-only, import-contract test so it can't recur. Fixed in PLAN Wave 1.

nodes.label: Surface-Parity Fiction Theme
nodes.rationale: CLI is the real product; MCP/HTTP/docs claim parity they don't deliver (missing /inspect, no escalation, no strip_metadata) and nothing tested N2 — root cause behind the P0.
